title: Agent Run
description: Represents the status and result of a Restack AI agent execution run.

runId.description: Unique identifier for the agent run.

agentName.description: The name of the agent that was executed.

status.description: Current execution status of the agent run.

input.description: Input parameters provided when scheduling the agent.

output.description: Output returned by the agent upon completion.

error.description: Error message if the agent run failed.

createdAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent run was created.

completedAt.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the agent run completed.
